full_text:
Zang Ba (Xuangao) 臧霸 (宣高)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zang Ba (臧霸), styledXuangao (宣高), was born in Hua County, Tai Shan Commandery (Presently Long Kou in Shan Dong Province). Originally served Tao Qian, then Lü Bu. Later joined Cao Cao. Zang Ba was affiliated with Tao Qian, Lu Bu, and the Wei Kingdom. Zang Ba lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
